questions.question: What's the most common surname in the U.S. that begins with the letter "D"?
What three-word Cookie Monster line made it into Bartlett's Familiar Quotations?
What two nations conducted nuclear tests that brought the Doomsday Clock to nine minutes before midnight in 1998?
What novel use for lamb tissue did 18-year-old Julius Schmid pioneer, in 1883?
What animal rights group demonstrated in support of McDonald's at the New York City launch of the McVeggie "burger"?
questions.answer: People for Ethical Treatment of Animals (PETA)

questions.question: What cartoon has Bugs Bunny belting out operatic numbers from a barber shop?
